utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items with detailed specifications under each: (1) property has details and price; (2) financing has method, terms, rates, amounts; (3) legal_services includes costs and breakdown; (4) moving_services specifies service level and cost; (5) setup_services lists utilities and cost; (6) total_budget includes a complete cost breakdown. All are fully covered and detailed.
